description_long: This is a spacious single-story bungalow with a modern open-plan layout, featuring a central living area surrounded by multiple bedrooms, bathrooms, and a kitchen. The exterior includes a large wooden deck with lounge chairs and a swimming pool, as well as a landscaped garden area with trees and flowering shrubs. There is a tennis court adjacent to the main building, and a covered garage with a driveway leading to the street. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections slightly raised for architectural interest. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor spaces to the outdoor amenities. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall, offering both privacy and accessibility.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open-plan interior, large deck, pool, garden, tennis court, and garage, surrounded by a low wall.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance, garage, and a clear view of the central living area, with the pool and deck visible to the right.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the backyard with the pool, deck, lounge chairs, and landscaped garden, as well as the tennis court on the right.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a top-down perspective of the garden, pool, and tennis court, with the bungalow's flat roof and window arrangement visible.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the tennis court, garden pavilion, and the rear of the bungalow, showing the garage and driveway access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped side windows
